name: Indian Flat Bread (Roti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the oil and the flour with a bit of water to make a soft dough.
2. Knead well and allow to rest for 30 minutes.
3. Roll into 4 balls, then roll out into circles.
4. Spread each circle with butter and sprinkle with flour.
5. Re-roll the dough and roll into circles again.
6. Fry gently with a little oil until brown flecks appear.
